digest.en: Israeli strikes on south Lebanon have killed six people according to the Health Ministry. Russia's 20-hour bombardment of Ukraine's Dnipro killed eight people. Israel also airlifted 240 Bnei Menashe members from Mizoram as India maintains a security advisory.
digest.hi: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप ने कहा कि उन्होंने ईरान के साथ युद्धविराम के बारे में सोचा भी नहीं है। ईरान के साथ तनाव के बीच ट्रंप की यह टिप्पणी आई है। ईरान के विदेश उप मंत्री अब्बास अराघची ने पाकिस्तान को चुपचाप योजना के बारे में बताया है।

articles.title: Six killed in Israeli strikes on south Lebanon: Health Ministry
articles.summary: Israeli airstrikes in south Lebanon killed six people, according to the Health Ministry. The strikes targeted projectiles launched from Lebanon, which were intercepted by Israel's military. Hezbollah condemned the strikes as a "blatant violation" of ceasefire understandings.

articles.title: One down four to go, says Rice, as Arsenal reignite title charge
articles.summary: Arsenal's manager, Mikel Arteta, expressed optimism about the team's chances of winning the title. Rice, a midfielder, said "one down, four to go" in a statement, indicating the team's determination to win the championship.

articles.title: Orbán steps down from Hungarian parliament after landslide defeat
articles.summary: Viktor Orbán stepped down from the Hungarian parliament after a landslide defeat. The outgoing prime minister will not take up his seat after leading his party back into opposition. Orbán steps down from Hungarian parliament after landslide defeat.

articles.title: China Hints Its 4th Aircraft Carrier Will Be Nuclear-Powered
articles.summary: China announced plans to build its fourth aircraft carrier, which will be powered by nuclear energy. This move marks a significant development in China's military capabilities, as it was the last major country to adopt aircraft carriers.

articles.title: Sooryavanshi fastest to reach 1,000 runs in T20s as teenager smashes 36-ball ton in IPL
articles.summary: Suryakumar Yadav, an Indian cricketer, became the fastest player to reach 1,000 runs in T20s. He achieved this milestone by scoring a 36-ball century in the Indian Premier League. Sooryavanshi fastest to reach 1,000 runs in T20s as teenager smashes 36-ball ton in IPL.

articles.title: Russia pounds Ukraine’s Dnipro for 20 hours straight, killing eight
articles.summary: Mexican authorities are investigating a car crash that killed two US agents, reportedly CIA employees, after a Mexican-led operation to destroy a drug lab. The agents were not permitted to operate in Mexico.

articles.title: Man City fight back to beat Southampton and reach fourth straight FA Cup final
articles.summary: Manchester City came from behind to defeat Southampton 2-1 in the FA Cup semifinals. The win secured City's fourth consecutive appearance in the FA Cup final, where they will face an opponent to be determined.

articles.title: Trump cancels US envoys’ trip after Iran’s Araghchi leaves Pakistan
articles.summary: Trump cancelled a trip by US envoys to Pakistan after Iran's Araghchi left the country. Trump later suggests that next talks will be over phone, saying 'If they want to talk, all they have to do is call!'.

articles.title: 4 Killed In Israeli Airstrikes On Lebanon Amid Fragile Ceasefire
articles.summary: Israeli airstrikes on Lebanon killed four people, targeting loaded rocket launchers belonging to Hezbollah. The strikes occurred amid a fragile ceasefire, with the Israeli military confirming the action. Israeli military said that it had struck loaded rocket launchers belonging to Hezbollah.

articles.title: 'Iran Can Call Us Anytime': Trump After Cancelling Top Officials' Pak Trip
articles.summary: US President Trump cancelled a trip to Pakistan by top officials, citing confusion within the Iranian leadership. Trump criticised the Iranian government for "infighting" and said they could contact him anytime.

articles.title: Trump cancels envoys' Pakistan trip, in blow to hopes for Iran war breakthrough
articles.summary: US President Trump cancelled a planned visit by his special envoys to Pakistan, citing confusion within the Iranian leadership. The trip cancellation is a blow to hopes for a breakthrough in the Iran war.

articles.title: Israel airlifts 240 Bnei Menashe members from Mizoram as India maintains security advisory
articles.summary: Israel airlifted 240 Bnei Menashe members from Mizoram to Tel Aviv. “Operation Wings of Dawn” aims to take individuals to Tel Aviv as part of religious migration. Israel airlifts 240 Bnei Menashe members from Mizoram as India maintains security advisory.

articles.title: Iran FM Abbas Araghchi and Pakistan PM Shehbaz Sharif meet in Pakistan
articles.summary: Iranian FM Abbas Araghchi met Pakistani PM Shehbaz Sharif in Islamabad to revive US talks. Iranian FM Araghchi met Pakistani PM Sharif in Islamabad as part of efforts to revive direct negotiations with the US.

articles.title: Palestinians in West Bank and some in Gaza vote in local elections
articles.summary: Local elections were held in the occupied West Bank and one Gazan city, with Palestinians voting for new leaders. Hamas and other groups did not participate in the elections, limiting the vote's scope.

articles.title: Britain courts Trump with King Charles
articles.summary: King Charles visited the US to help repair strained US-UK relations. On a state visit to the US, the British monarch is being deployed to help steady increasingly strained US-UK relations.

articles.title: 2 Missing, 1 Body, 1 Killer: In US University, Bangladeshi Students' Murder
articles.summary: One body was found after a murder at a US university involving Bangladeshi students. Abugharbieh had studied at USF between 2021 and 2023. (HCSOSheriff). 2 Missing, 1 Body, 1 Killer: In US University, Bangladeshi Students' Murder.

articles.title: Indigenous Speakers Are Booed During Commemorations of Australia’s War Dead
articles.summary: Indigenous speakers were booed during Anzac Day commemorations in three Australian cities. The disruptions appeared to target a widespread Aboriginal custom acknowledging the land's original inhabitants. The incidents drew attention to ongoing tensions between Indigenous and non-Indigenous Australians.

articles.title: The 85-Year-Old Widow Snagged by Trump’s Immigration Crackdown
articles.summary: Marie-Thérèse Ross-Mahé, an 85-year-old French widow, was deported by US authorities. In her first interview since being deported, Marie-Thérèse Ross-Mahé, the French widow of a former G. I., recounted her experience in ICE detention.

articles.title: Paris and Athens exchange mutual defense pledges amid geopolitical turmoil - politico.eu
articles.summary: Paris and Athens exchanged mutual defense pledges amid geopolitical turmoil. Paris and Athens exchange mutual defense pledges amid geopolitical turmoil politico. eu. Paris and Athens exchange mutual defense pledges amid geopolitical turmoil - politico. eu.

articles.title: What counts as the woods? Judge axes Nova Scotia’s ban that defied ‘commonsense definitions’
articles.summary: A Canadian court overturned Nova Scotia's woods ban. The ruling sided with a hiker who challenged the order.

articles.title: Seven dead in major Russian attack on Ukraine
articles.summary: Seven people died in a Russian attack on Ukraine, with four killed in Dnipro. The city of Dnipro was hardest hit, with officials saying four died in a strike on a residential building.

articles.title: ईरान के साथ युद्धविराम पर बोले ट्रंप- 'मैंने इसके बारे में सोचा भी नहीं है'
articles.summary: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति ट्रम्प ने ईरान के साथ युद्धविराम पर कहा कि उन्होंने इसके बारे में सोचा भी नहीं है। यह बयान इस्लामाबाद में ईरान और अमेरिका के बीच जारी तनाव के बीच आया है। ट्रम्प की टिप्पणी ने पश्चिम एशिया में स्थिति को और भी जटिल बना दिया है।

hi.title: ईरान के साथ युद्धविराम पर बोले ट्रंप- 'मैंने इसके बारे में सोचा भी नहीं है'

articles.title: अब्बास अराघची ने चुपचाप पाकिस्तान को बताई योजना, गेंद अब ट्रंप के पाले में
articles.summary: ईरान के उप विदेश मंत्री अब्बास अराघची ने पाकिस्तान को एक योजना प्रस्तुत की है जिसका उद्देश्य ईरान, अमेरिका और इज़राइल के बीच युद्ध को स्थायी रूप से समाप्त करना है। अब यह गेंद अमेरिका के पाले में है। अराघची की इस पहल ने क्षेत्र में नई आशाएं जगाई हैं।

articles.summary: अमेरिका और ईरान के बीच तनाव बढ़ रहा है, जिससे पश्चिम एशिया में स्थिति अस्थिर हो गई है। अमेरिका अपनी रणनीति पर अड़ा हुआ है, जबकि ईरान भी अपनी स्थिति से समझौता नहीं कर रहा है। इससे क्षेत्र में 긴त बढ़ गई है।

articles.title: अमेरिका के लिए भरोसेमंद साथी नहीं, 'सिरदर्द' है पाकिस्तान; इस अमेरिकी रिपोर्ट में हुए कई बड़े खुलासे
articles.summary: एक अमेरिकी रिपोर्ट में कहा गया है कि पाकिस्तान अमेरिका के लिए एक भरोसेमंद साथी नहीं है और वह एक "सिरदर्द" है। इस रिपोर्ट में कई बड़े खुलासे हुए हैं जो पाकिस्तान के साथ अमेरिका के संबंधों पर प्रकाश डालते हैं। यह रिपोर्ट अमेरिका की नीतियों को प्रभावित कर सकती है।

articles.title: जेलेंस्की पुतिन से मिलने को राजी! 50 माह से जारी जंग के बीच रूस-यूक्रेन के बीच सुलह के प्रयास तेज
articles.summary: यूक्रेन के राष्ट्रपति जेलेंस्की ने रूस के राष्ट्रपति पुतिन से मिलने के लिए सहमति जताई है। यह 50 महीनों से जारी जंग के बीच रूस और यूक्रेन के बीच सुलह के प्रयासों में एक महत्वपूर्ण कदम है। जेलेंस्की और पुतिन की बैठक से शांति की उम्मीदें बढ़ी हैं।

articles.summary: बांग्लादेश में खसरा संकट ने स्वास्थ्य व्यवस्था की कमजोरियों को उजागर किया है. एक रिपोर्ट में गंभीर चिंताएं व्यक्त की गई हैं और स्वास्थ्य प्रणाली में सुधार की आवश्यकता पर बल दिया गया है.
